title: Sweet and Sour Cupcake Power!

title: Speaking the Same Language Around the World
story: Every December 15, language lovers celebrate Zamenhof Day by speaking, learning, and sharing Esperanto - a special language created to help people from different countries talk to each other! Dr. Zamenhof invented this amazing language over 100 years ago, mixing words from many languages to make something everyone could learn easily. Today, thousands of people post Esperanto messages online, attend virtual meetups, and teach friends basic phrases like "saluton" (hello) and "dankon" (thank you).
